# Avratanu Biswas

> Personal site of Avratanu Biswas (Avra) — co-founder & CTO at avei (VC-backed), building Dagny (bydagny.com), AI to run and grow your business. Based in Oslo, Norway.

## About

- Currently: Co-founder & CTO at avei (https://avei.ai), building Dagny (https://www.bydagny.com) — AI to run and grow your business.
- Previously: Early team member at Riff, formerly Databutton (https://riff.ai), through its $16M Series A and the scale-up that followed.
- Academia: PhD in Biophysics from Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam and the Biological Research Centre in Szeged (graduated summa cum laude). Marie Curie Early-stage Researcher. Research focused on picosecond-scale excitation energy transfer in cyanobacterial photosynthesis, using time-resolved fluorescence spectroscopy and kinetic compartment modeling. 10+ peer-reviewed publications.

## Pages

- [Home](https://avratanu.com/): Who I am and what I'm building.
- [Research](https://avratanu.com/research/): PhD research summary — photosynthesis, energy transfer, spectroscopy, kinetic modeling.
